seoTitle: How to Chat on Monday.com: Updates & Mentions Guide
metaDescription: Learn how to use Monday.com's Updates Section, @mentions, and Inbox to keep project conversations organized instead of scattered emails.
intro: Project conversations scattered across email chains make it hard to know who said what and when. This guide covers Monday.com's built-in communication tools, from writing updates on individual tasks to tagging teammates with @mentions and catching up through your personal Inbox. It's meant for anyone who wants project discussion tied directly to the work being tracked.

steps.heading: Open the Updates Section
steps.body: Click the speech bubble icon on any item or task row to open its conversation panel.

steps.heading: Write and format an update
steps.body: Type your update, format the text, and attach files or images directly within the item's conversation card.

steps.heading: Use @mentions to notify people
steps.body: Type @ followed by a name to instantly notify individual team members, guests, or entire teams about the update.

steps.heading: Reply and acknowledge updates
steps.body: Reply to specific updates to keep threads organized, and use likes to acknowledge messages without adding noise.

steps.heading: Check your personal Inbox
steps.body: Open your Inbox feed to see every conversation, mention, and update across all your active boards in one place.

steps.heading: Adjust notification preferences
steps.body: Fine-tune your notification settings to reduce noise while still catching the updates that matter.

faq.question: How do I notify a specific teammate about an update?
faq.answer: Use the @mention feature by typing @ and their name to instantly notify them, a group, or a guest.

faq.question: Can I attach files to an update?
faq.answer: Yes, you can attach files or images directly within an item's conversation card alongside your written update.

faq.question: Where do I see all my mentions across different boards?
faq.answer: Your personal Inbox feed aggregates every conversation, mention, and update across all your active boards in one view.

faq.question: Can I stop getting notified on every single update?
faq.answer: Yes, notification preferences can be adjusted to reduce communication noise while keeping the alerts you actually need.
